topic: Junie CLI Review 2026: JetBrains Terminal AI Agent with BYOK Support

competitors.title: Junie CLI: JetBrains' Entry into Terminal AI Agents (Placeholder)
key_points: Junie CLI is JetBrains' terminal AI agent offering, launched in Q1 2026 to compete with Claude Code and OpenCode
BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) support allowing developers to use their existing OpenAI, Anthropic, or other API keys
Deep integration with JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ, PyCharm, WebStorm) for seamless workflow between IDE and terminal
Enterprise-focused features include SOC2 compliance, team management, and usage analytics
Pricing model: Free tier with limited features, Pro tier at $15-20/month, Enterprise tier with BYOK and advanced controls

stats.fact: JetBrains IDEs have over 10 million professional developer users globally as of 2026
BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) support is a top-3 enterprise security requirement for AI coding tools in 2026
Terminal AI agent market projected to reach $2.5B in annual revenue by 2027

angles: JetBrains' strategic move: From IDE plugins to standalone terminal AI agent
BYOK advantage: Cost control and security for enterprise adoption
Terminal vs IDE integration: Hybrid workflow possibilities
Competition analysis: Junie CLI vs Claude Code vs OpenCode
Future roadmap: How JetBrains could dominate enterprise AI development
outline: Introduction: JetBrains enters the terminal AI agent market
What is Junie CLI? Terminal AI agent with BYOK support
